title: Benjamin Sniddlegrass and the Cauldron of Penguins
original_title: Benjamin Sniddlegrass and The Cauldron of Penguins
overview: The story of a nerdy skiffle-loving redhead from Cockfosters, who discovers he's a wizard. He journeys to Australia and is taught magic under the watchful eye of mentor Pentangle and filmmaker Werner Herzog
